description: Live transits, ESMS ingredients, cosmic recipes, synastry & transit×natal overlays by alchm.kitchen
name: io.github.gregcastro23/alchm-kitchen

environmentVariables.description: Your alchm.kitchen API key — mint one at https://alchm.kitchen/profile/api-keys. Optional; unlocks per-user quotas and invocation telemetry. The server runs anonymously without it.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_USER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Optional; enables the token gate and invocation logging. Omit for anonymous mode (all tools still function).
environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL
